title: Observation of decadal change in the Atlantic meridional overturning circulation using 10 years of continuous transport data
justification: Illustration of temporal mean of zonally averaged Atlantic meridional overturning stream function ... from the JPL ECCO numerical model state estimate analysis

title: Large-scale impact of Saharan dust on the North Atlantic Ocean circulation
justification: The open southern and northern lateral boundaries are forced with data from a global ocean state estimate using an adjoint data assimilation version of the MITgcm at 1 /C14 resolution (ECCO iteration 69).

title: Estimating mean dynamic topography in boundary currents and the use of Argo trajectories
justification: Here we use the Southern Ocean State Estimate (SOSE), a version of the global ECCO model that has been applied to latitudes south of 25 /C14 S[ Mazloff et al ., 2010].

title: The eddy kinetic energy budget in the Red Sea
justification: The eastern open boundary is specified with an ocean reanalysis from the Estimation of the Circulation and Climate of the Ocean (ECCO) project [Kohl and Stammer, 2008].

title: A central California coastal ocean modeling study: 2. Adjoint sensitivities to local and remote forcing mechanisms
justification: The Estimating the Circulation and Climate of the Ocean supported by the Global Ocean Data Assimilation Experiment boundary conditions used for our control run (part 1)
